calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation.
Roberta Goodman, General Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Elizabeth Reinhart.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 16, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Direct Access to Housing (DAH) Program,
Empress Hotel Tenant Lease Agreement dated 12/09/04----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Ten Day Notice to Cure or Quit with POS dated 05/29/08------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation, and against defendant Elizabeth Reinhart as follows:

Plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation shall recover from defendant Elizabeth Reinhart Rent/Per Diem Damages in the amount of $505.12, $0.00 in attorney's fees with costs waived, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $505.12.

Plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefit corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 144 Eddy Street, #200, San Francisco, CA. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, counsel for plaintiff The Tides Center, a California NonProfit Public Benefit Corporation; Doug Gary, representative, appearearing on behalf of plaintiff; Stephen Abreu, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant Elizabeth Reinhart, who is also present
Settlement conference is held; case is not settled. The August 4, 2008 trial date remains.
Judge Pro Tem Andrew Westley, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
